[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A screenshot shows a dark-themed chat or messaging interface with several message bubbles, audio playback controls, and microphone icons over a patterned background.

Main Subject:
The central focus is a horizontal audio player-style message bubble in green with a play button, a waveform graphic, and timing or status markers, surrounded by other message entries that include text and audio progress bars.

Setting:
The scene is an indoor, screen-based interface view with no real-world environment shown. The background is dark gray to black with a repeating line-art pattern of icons and shapes. The lighting is uniform like a digital display.

Visual Details:
Multiple chat text lines appear on the left in white, with small time stamps in lighter gray near the lines. In the upper-middle area there is a green rounded rectangle containing the word “venn” and the phrase “vn ngomong halo,” alongside a play triangle icon, a waveform-like vertical bar graphic, and small colored dots and markers. Another green rounded rectangle near the right-center shows “mw apain ytm” with a small trailing symbol or mark. A larger dark gray audio bar appears lower-left with a play icon, a green dot, and a long waveform strip, plus a circular orange button on the right with a microphone symbol inside. At the bottom there is a message input area with “Ketik pesan,” and on the right side are small icons including a camera icon and a microphone button in a circular green background. The overall layout is layered, with audio controls aligned horizontally and the audio progress bars stretching across the center. The camera angle is not applicable because it is a flat screenshot.

Practical Summary:
The image is a chat interface screenshot with multiple messages and audio playback controls. It includes a green audio player bubble, an audio bar with a microphone button, and a text input field labeled “Ketik pesan.”

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
